creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to C Hutchinson from comment #0)
> Any communication via nsd-control(8) generates the following:
> 
> error: xfrd_handle_ipc: bad mode (nnn)
> 
> etc.

As explained to Chris (not here but in directly), this is not a problem with the port but with the upstream.

Theproblem is fixed by the upstream and will be in the next release and the port will be updated accordingly.

The upstream did povided a workaround: compile with bind8-stats enabled

Given this, I would like o consider this issue solved so we can close he ticket.

        jaap
